title: Bridge Paper: Sense of agency for intracortical brain-machine interfaces.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nested Agency** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Free will — sense of agency, voluntary action, intentional binding, volitional control.
**Phase context:** sense of agency, voluntary action, free will, intentional binding, volition

Paper: Sense of agency for intracortical brain-machine interfaces.
DOI: 10.1038/s41562-021-01233-2
Abstract: Intracortical brain-machine interfaces decode motor commands from neural signals and translate them into actions, enabling movement for paralysed individuals. The subjective sense of agency associated with actions generated via intracortical brain-machine interfaces, the neural mechanisms involved and its clinical relevance are currently unknown.
